refs.description: Redis implements its sorted set (ZSET) type using a skip list; t_zset.c contains the full zskiplist creation, insert, delete, and rank operations.
The JDK's ConcurrentSkipListMap is a scalable concurrent map backed by a lock-free skip list, the standard production sorted concurrent map in Java.
Facebook's Folly library provides a templated lock-free ConcurrentSkipList used for high-performance concurrent sorted access in C++.
